ValidationRule.description: This validation rule enforces that Quad Meeting status transitions must follow the defined process by allowing users to move forward only one stage at a time, restricting backward movement except through "Need to Reschedule".
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Meeting_Status__c), NOT( ISPICKVAL(Meeting_Status__c, "Archived") ), NOT( OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Meeting_Status__c), "Need to Schedule"), ISPICKVAL(Meeting_Status__c, "Scheduled") ), AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Meeting_Status__c), "Scheduled"), ISPICKVAL(Meeting_Status__c, "Planning") ), AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Meeting_Status__c), "Planning"), ISPICKVAL(Meeting_Status__c, "Meeting Held") ), AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Meeting_Status__c), "Meeting Held"), ISPICKVAL(Meeting_Status__c, "Complete") ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Meeting_Status__c, "Need to Reschedule"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Meeting_Status__c), "Need to Reschedule")) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Meeting_Status__c), "Need to Reschedule"), OR( ISPICKVAL(Meeting_Status__c, "Need to Schedule"), ISPICKVAL(Meeting_Status__c, "Planning") ) ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invalid status transition. You must follow the meeting process step-by-step. Backward movement is only allowed via "Need to Reschedule".
